notes:
- New: predicted files are pushed directly to your friend over peer-to-peer in the background, with no cloud detour
- When you click send on a file the predictor already prepared, it lands on your friend's machine in well under a second, even if the file is huge
- Only the parts of a file that actually changed get sent — re-sending a re-edited project skips the unchanged chunks
- Cloud uploads are now the fallback path, not the default — they only kick in when your friend is offline or unreachable
